positive: A minimalist, high-contrast vector-graphic illustration of a celestial raccoon peering through a stylized crescent moon. The raccoon is rendered in a sleek, black silhouette with neon turquoise and deep indigo accents outlining its form. The background features scattered constellations, geometric cosmic dust patterns, and a gradient wash transitioning from midnight blue to cosmic purple. The overall style is modern pop-art meets retro-futurism, utilizing thick, defined lines and clean, solid color blocks. Composition must be perfectly centered, designed to look impeccable when printed on a plain cotton t-shirt. Focus on crisp edges and impactful graphic design elements. Volumetric lighting effect achieved solely through color contrast, not shadows.
negative: blurry, poor anatomy, extra limbs, noise, artifact, signature, watermark, text, low resolution, cartoonish, photorealistic, messy, clutter, logo, trademark
